languages.text: "Уничтожение еретиков — это обязанность каждого гражданина Империума. Я бы{mf|л|ла} ра{mf|д|да} выполнить свой долг".
"The destruction of heretics is the responsibility of every subject of the Imperium. I was pleased to fulfil my duty."
languages.original_text: "Уничтожение еретиков — это обязанность каждого гражданина Империума. Я бы{mf|л|ла} ра{mf|д|да} выполнить свой долг".

traits.locale_text: "The destruction of heretics is the responsibility of every subject of the Imperium. I was pleased to fulfil my duty."
"The destruction of heretics is the responsibility of every subject of the Imperium. I was pleased to fulfil my duty."
"The destruction of heretics is the responsibility of every subject of the Imperium. I was pleased to fulfil my duty."

languages.text: 「異端者の破壊は帝国のすべての臣民の責任である。私の義務を果たすことができたことを喜ぶ」
languages.original_text: "The destruction of heretics is the responsibility of every subject of the Imperium. I was pleased to fulfil my duty."

traits.locale_text: 「異端者の破壊は帝国のすべての臣民の責任である。私の義務を果たすことができたことを喜ぶ」

languages.text: «Destruir a los herejes es responsabilidad de todo súbdito del Imperium. Ha sido un placer ayudar».
languages.original_text: "The destruction of heretics is the responsibility of every subject of the Imperium. I was pleased to fulfil my duty."

traits.locale_text: «Destruir a los herejes es responsabilidad de todo súbdito del Imperium. Ha sido un placer ayudar».

languages.text: “铲除异端是每位帝国子民的职责。能履行义务是我的荣幸。”
languages.original_text: "The destruction of heretics is the responsibility of every subject of the Imperium. I was pleased to fulfil my duty."

traits.locale_text: “铲除异端是每位帝国子民的职责。能履行义务是我的荣幸。”

languages.text: "Die Vernichtung von Ketzern ist die Verantwortung aller Untertanen des Imperiums. Ich habe meine Pflicht gerne erfüllt."
languages.original_text: "The destruction of heretics is the responsibility of every subject of the Imperium. I was pleased to fulfil my duty."

traits.locale_text: "Die Vernichtung von Ketzern ist die Verantwortung aller Untertanen des Imperiums. Ich habe meine Pflicht gerne erfüllt."

languages.text: "Kâfirlerin yok edilmesi, İmparatorluk'un her tebaasının sorumluluğudur. Görevimi yerine getirmekten memnuniyet duydum."
languages.original_text: "The destruction of heretics is the responsibility of every subject of the Imperium. I was pleased to fulfil my duty."

traits.locale_text: "Kâfirlerin yok edilmesi, İmparatorluk'un her tebaasının sorumluluğudur. Görevimi yerine getirmekten memnuniyet duydum."

languages.text: « L'éradication des hérétiques relève de la responsabilité de tous les sujets de l'Imperium. Je suis {mf|satisfait|satisfaite} d'avoir accompli mon devoir. »
languages.original_text: "The destruction of heretics is the responsibility of every subject of the Imperium. I was pleased to fulfil my duty."

traits.locale_text: « L'éradication des hérétiques relève de la responsabilité de tous les sujets de l'Imperium. Je suis {mf|satisfait|satisfaite} d'avoir accompli mon devoir. »
